positive: A minimalist, highly detailed celestial tapestry featuring two interconnected, stylized lunar and solar geometric elements. The design should incorporate clean, bold linework and stylized flora (such as ferns and stylized crescent moons) flowing seamlessly between the motifs. Use a deep cosmic indigo background contrasted sharply with glowing, ethereal gold and vibrant teal accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, utilizing strong negative space and a symmetrical, harmonious arrangement suitable for a repeating pattern or central apparel graphic. Style: Sacred geometry meets modern botanical illustration, digital art, flat vector aesthetic, symmetrical, vibrant contrast, volumetric lighting, high resolution.
